completed_slice: Removed provider-controlled error messages from Cloudflare access-probe artifacts and replaced them with bounded allowlisted code diagnostics.
verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent committed source and test content.
blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires usable CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values, followed by a production workflow run that returns and verifies the Pages hostname.
next_action: Add the sanitizer test to the production workflow contract gate, execute the authorization preflight, then dispatch the production deployment only when readiness and exact-run context both verify.
